title: 10 best herbal capsules for grey hair
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for grey hair are a natural supplement that combines various plant-based ingredients to address the issue of premature graying. These capsules work by nourishing the hair follicles, promoting melanin production, and reducing oxidative stress, which can contribute to graying. Examples include capsules containing saw palmetto, ginseng, and biotin, which have been shown to improve hair density, thickness, and color. By using these herbal capsules, individuals with grey hair can experience a significant reduction in grey hairs, leading to increased confidence and improved self-esteem, allowing them to live life to the fullest without the burden of premature aging.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Burdock capsules helps with grey hair because of its ability to nourish and rejuvenate the scalp, promoting a healthy growth environment for hair follicles. The antioxidants and vitamins present in burdock root help to improve circulation, reducing stress and inflammation that can contribute to premature graying. Additionally, burdock's rich content of saponins and phenolic acids may help to block the conversion of melanin, the pigment responsible for hair color, allowing for a more vibrant and natural-looking head of hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Burdock capsules contain antioxidants like flavonoids, saponins, and lignans, which help neutralize free radicals and oxidative stress in the body, reducing damage to hair follicles and promoting healthier hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Burdock's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as arctigenin and arctiopicrin, help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to premature graying by damaging hair follicles and disrupting melanocyte function.

Stress-reducing and adaptogenic properties: Burdock capsules have been traditionally used to calm the nervous system and alleviate stress, which is a common cause of grey hair. By reducing stress levels, burdock may help promote a more balanced hormonal environment that supports healthy hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the burdock plant are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help to promote hair growth and improve hair color.
Seeds: Burdock seeds contain a high concentration of fatty acids, vitamins, and minerals that nourish the scalp and promote healthy hair growth.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dodder capsules helps with grey hair because they contain a potent blend of herbs that promote natural pigmentation in the scalp. The antioxidants and nutrients present in these capsules help to nourish the hair follicles, stimulating melanin production and reversing graying process. Additionally, the capsules' ability to improve circulation and oxygenation to the scalp also contributes to the rejuvenation of hair color. By addressing the root cause of grey hair, dodder capsules can help restore a rich, natural hair color and reduce the appearance of premature aging.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Herbal dodder capsules contain antioxidants that neutralize free radicals, which can damage hair follicles and lead to premature greying.
Adaptogenic Properties: Dodder has been shown to have adaptogenic effects, helping the body to adapt to stress and promoting a healthy scalp, which is important for maintaining a full head of color.
Vasodilatory Effects: The capsules can help dilate blood vessels in the scalp, increasing blood flow and potentially reversing or slowing down grey hair growth by nourishing the hair follicles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in promoting healthy hair growth and preventing graying.
Barks: Containing phenolic acids and flavonoids, they help to stimulate blood flow to the scalp and promote melanin production.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Horsetail capsules helps with grey hair because they are rich in silica, a mineral that is essential for maintaining healthy hair. Silica deficiency has been linked to premature graying of hair, and horsetail supplements help to replenish this vital nutrient. As a result, horsetail capsules can help to promote a thicker, shinier coat of hair and even encourage the natural pigmentation process, reducing the appearance of grey hairs over time.
remedy_properties: High silica content: Horsetail capsules contain high amounts of silica, a mineral essential for healthy hair growth and maintenance, which can help to restore natural hair color by strengthening hair follicles.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in horsetail capsules, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, help to protect the hair from oxidative damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to premature graying of hair.

Anti-inflammatory effects: Horsetail's anti-inflammatory properties may help to reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can lead to hair loss and grey hair, and promote a healthy environment for hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in silica, horsetail roots help strengthen hair follicles and promote hair growth, reducing graying.
Rhizomes: Containing antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, horsetail rhizomes may help combat oxidative stress and promote healthy hair pigmentation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English ivy capsules helps with grey hair because they contain antioxidants and flavonoids that help to promote healthy hair growth. The plant's active compounds, including epigallocatechin gallate (EGCG), have been shown to improve melanin production in the hair follicles, resulting in thicker, darker locks and a reduced appearance of grey hair. Additionally, English ivy capsules may help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to premature graying. By taking these capsules, individuals may be able to promote a healthier, more vibrant head of hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Herbal English ivy capsules contain antioxidants that help protect the scalp and hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to premature graying of hair.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The capsules' anti-inflammatory compounds can reduce inflammation in the scalp, which may be a contributing factor to grey hair, and promote healthy blood flow to the hair follicles.

Stress-reducing properties: Herbal English ivy has been traditionally used as a stress-reliever, and reducing stress levels has been linked to preventing premature graying of hair. By reducing cortisol levels and promoting relaxation, these capsules may help slow down or even reverse grey hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and saponins, roots help promote hair growth and reduce oxidative stress that contributes to premature graying.
Barks: Containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, barks have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate scalp irritations and promote a healthy environment for hair growth.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender capsules helps with grey hair because they stimulate the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reversing graying. Additionally, lavender's ability to regulate hormonal balance can help to promote a healthier environment for hair growth, leading to thicker, shinier, and more vibrant locks.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Lavender's antioxidant properties help protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to premature greying and hair loss.

Regulatory effect on melanin production: Some studies suggest that lavender extracts may help regulate the production of melanin, the pigment responsible for hair color, potentially slowing down or reversing grey hair growth.

Seeds: Lavender seeds contain fatty acids and omega-3 oils that nourish the scalp and promote melanin production, helping to reverse grey hair.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lemon balm's antioxidant compounds help protect the hair follicles from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to premature graying.

Vasodilatory properties: The vasodilatory effects of lemon balm capsules can improve blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing inflammation that may be associated with grey hair.

Adaptogenic properties: Lemon balm's adaptogenic compounds help reduce stress and anxiety, which are common underlying causes of grey hair, by normalizing cortisol levels and promoting a sense of calm.
